projects.name: AI Sales Agent
projects.description: End-to-end autonomous sales agent that identifies leads on X, researches their funding and company signals, scores them, and runs personalized outreach sequences. Handles everything from discovery to booking calls.

projects.name: Mission Control Dashboard
projects.description: Internal command center for Black Sand operations. Real-time visibility into agent status, project progress, team tasks, finances, and content performance -- all in one dark-themed dashboard.

projects.name: Client Onboarding Automation
projects.description: Automated onboarding pipeline for new agency clients. Collects intake data, provisions agent instances, sets up reporting, and kicks off initial research -- reducing onboarding from 2 weeks to 2 days.

projects.name: Content Engine
projects.description: AI-powered content creation and distribution system. Generates thought leadership threads, blog posts, and LinkedIn content based on market signals, company wins, and industry trends. Tracks performance and optimizes for engagement.

projects.name: Lead Research Agent
projects.description: Specialized sub-agent that enriches prospect data by pulling funding rounds, team composition, tech stack, recent news, and social signals. Feeds enriched profiles into the Sales Agent for personalized outreach.
